/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -miphoneos-version-min=15.0 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o png.framework/png -install_name @rpath/png.framework/png CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/png.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngerror.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngget.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngmem.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngpread.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngread.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngrio.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngrtran.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngrutil.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngset.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngtrans.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngwio.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngwrite.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngwtran.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngwutil.c.o CMakeFiles/png_framework.dir/pngsimd.c.o  /Users/ombhardwaj/Development/projects/aiotool/imagecore/packages/core/build-ios/deps/lib/libz.a
